title: Asparagopsis arborescens
taxonomy: Asparagopsis arborescens is a species of red algae in the family Corallinaceae, within the class Florideophyceae. This classification places it within the larger group of red algae, which are characterized by their red or pink pigmentation. The class Florideophyceae is further divided into several orders, with Corallinaceae being one of the most diverse and widespread families. Asparagopsis arborescens is a relatively newly discovered species, and more research is needed to fully understand its classification and relationships to other algae. Further study of this species will likely provide more insights into its classification and its place within the broader kingdom of algae.
